title: Forecast intelligence
subtitle: Forecasting is advisory. Inventory ledger remains the source of truth.

fields.label: Forecast demand next 30 days
fields.helper: Expected demand for the configured forecast window.

fields.label: Average daily demand
fields.helper: Average recent sales-equivalent demand per day.

fields.label: Days of cover
fields.helper: Estimated days available stock can cover demand.

fields.label: Stockout risk
fields.helper: Advisory risk based on demand and available stock.

fields.label: Overstock risk
fields.helper: Advisory risk based on demand and available stock.

fields.label: Suggested reorder quantity
fields.helper: Advisory quantity only. Does not create or approve a purchase order.

fields.label: Confidence
fields.helper: Confidence based on movement history, stock quality, and supplier inputs.

fields.label: Explanation
fields.value: Forecast is visible, but confidence is low because source data quality or supplier lead time stability needs review.

warnings: Low confidence forecast. Verify movement history, stock accuracy, and supplier lead time before acting.

guardrails.notice: Forecasting is advisory. Inventory ledger remains the source of truth.
